MASTER COURT CALENDAR OF MAY-24-2021 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON MAY-24-2021 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 220, JUDGE KATHLEEN A KELLY. APPEARANCES VIA COURTCALL BY RONALD ROUNDY, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF; JETHRO BUSCH, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANT. THE COURT SET AN ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE ISSUED TO ATTY. HARMAN S. RANDHAWA (COUNSEL OF RECORD FOR PLAINTIFF) FOR JUNE-04-2021 IN DEPARTMENT 206 AT 9:30 AM TO SHOW CAUSE WHY SANCTIONS, IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00, SHOULD NOT BE IMPOSED FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDER PURSUANT TO THE NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL AND TRIAL ORDER. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. IF SANCTIONS PAID BEFORE 06/04/21 THEN THE COURT WILL VACATE THE OSC DATE. SANCTIONS MAY BE PAID VIA E-FILING. THE COURT ASSIGNED THIS CASE FOR TRIAL TO JUDGE KATHLEEN KELLY IN DEPT. 220. PARTIES TO CONTACT JUDGE KELLY BY 4:30PM TODAY VIA THE E-MAIL ADDRESS PROVIDED AT TRIAL CALL FOR TRIAL SCHEDULING AND THE DEPARTMENT'S PHONE NUMBER WAS ALSO PROVIDED. THE COURT ENCOURAGED PARTIES TO RESOLVE THE CASE. IF RESOLVED BEFORE 06/04/21, THEN THE COURT WILL VACATE THE OSC DATE AND SANCTIONS. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206/SKF)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT And Interlocutory Order For Partition And Sale Of The Subject Property And Appointment Of Receiver
Off Calendar May-21-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PLAINTIFF RNO FINANCIAL , LLC, MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT And Interlocutory Order For Partition And Sale Of The Subject Property And Appointment Of Receiver is OFF CALENDAR. Motion improperly set within 30 days of trial. No separate statement. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-17-2021 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Possession Of Real Property
Off Calendar Dec-08-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances via Courtcall:
Gabrielle W. Cutler, Esq., (916) 671-3138 , appearing for RNO Financial LLC, Plaintiff
No other appearances.

Hearing is held. During attendance roll call, Ms, Cutler stated that she contested the tentative ruling but did not comply with the tentative ruling rule. At the start of the motion calendar, there was no response by Ms. Cutler.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF RNO FINANCIAL, LLC,'S Motion For Possession Of Real Property is DENIED.Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not Reported. (D501)
